commands.hypothesis: Deployed 2026-05-20 after journal proposals from 05-19 and 05-20 sat in NO-DATA limbo (no commands.json upsert was sent). The combo `vel 50-200 + confirmed_recovery` is currently the #1 best-combo by opt_avg_ret (24.56% at n=40, opt cell TP=75/SL=30). Hypothesis: the high-velocity band (50-200 SOL/min — fast pumpers that aren't quite extreme bots) intersected with the C5 confirmed_recovery filter (dip_and_recover_flag=1 AND pct_t30>pct_t15 AND pct_t45>pct_t30) selects for tokens that pumped hard pre-graduation, briefly dipped post-grad, and recovered by T+45. The recovery signal acts as the path-confirmation overlay on a universe that otherwise has high variance. Risk factors: vel 50-200 is ~9% of population AND confirmed_recovery requires C5 path data — intersection coverage is sparse (~1-2% of grads), so target_n=100 in 21 days is tight. Deployed with v28 cohort conventions: pollIntervalSec=1 (1s SL/TP timing) + trailingTpEnabled=true / dropPct=10. entryTimingSec=60 to guarantee recovery_t45_above_t30 is written before evaluation.
